---
title: "Convergence Analysis"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Convergence Analysis}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  eval = FALSE
)
```

## Overview

This vignette demonstrates how to evaluate the convergence behaviour of the
MFM-SBM collapsed Gibbs sampler across increasing sample sizes.

## Running the Convergence Test

```{r}
library(mfmsbm)

n_vec <- seq(20, 100, 20)

ri <- convergence_test(
  K = 2, a = 1, b = 1, gamma_ = 1, lambda = 1,
  p = 0.5, q = 0.1, n_vec = n_vec,
  N = 10, K_start = 9, M = 350, burn_in = 100,
  type_network = "unbalanced"
)
```

## Visualizing Results

```{r}
if (requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly = TRUE)) {
  library(ggplot2)
  df <- data.frame(n = n_vec, rand_index = ri)
  ggplot(df, aes(x = n, y = rand_index)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_line() +
    ylim(0, 1) +
    labs(x = "Sample size (n)", y = "Average Rand Index") +
    theme_bw()
}
```
